description: Settlement of displaced Ashwalkers and Voided; needs supplies or protection
All three claimants have agents here; each approaches party separately
Salvage trader selling stripped chassis parts; some from recently fallen Forged
Unregistered Iron Blessed living communally; fear Orthodoxy raids
Information-sharing network; will trade intel for discretion

Forcible recruitment sweep; Ashwalker and Voided have no legal protection
Multiple witnesses report seeing Vaen crossing the river; trail is fresh
A cluster of people all received identical dreams last night; party investigates
Unusual resonance buildup suggests Convergence is accelerating; urgency encounter
